endpoint_matchers.description: Required. Endpoint matchers associated with an application. A combination of hostname and ports as endpoint matcher is used to match the application. Match conditions for OR logic. An array of match conditions to allow for multiple matching criteria. The rule is considered a match if one the conditions are met. The conditions can be one of the following combination (Hostname), (Hostname & Ports) EXAMPLES: Hostname - ("*.abc.com"), ("xyz.abc.com") Hostname and Ports - ("abc.com" and "22"), ("abc.com" and "22,33") etc Structure is [documented below](#nested_endpoint_matchers).

application_id.description: Optional. User-settable Application resource ID. * Must start with a letter. * Must contain between 4-63 characters from `/a-z-/`. * Must end with a number or letter.

display_name.description: Optional. An arbitrary user-provided name for the Application resource. Cannot exceed 64 characters.

upstreams.description: Optional. List of which upstream resource(s) to forward traffic to. Structure is [documented below](#nested_upstreams).

egress_policy.description: Optional. Routing policy information. Structure is [documented below](#nested_upstreams_upstreams_egress_policy).

network.description: Network to forward traffic to. Structure is [documented below](#nested_upstreams_upstreams_network).

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.

regions.description: Required. List of regions where the application sends traffic to.

name.description: Required. Network name is of the format: `projects/{project}/global/networks/{network}`
